questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the path of the blue ball.
questions.answer: The blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_right at (1,8), then ramp_right at (2,7), then ramp_right at (3,8), landing in the interceptor at (8,9).

questions.question: What is the final state of the board after the ball is intercepted?
questions.answer: The interceptor now contains a blue ball.
